label: Summit
notes: Templates are in place. Slot map will be ported from summit-theme-website-builder SKILL.md node maps once Elevate is confirmed. Summit specifics: elementskit-heading uses {{accent}} syntax, jkit_button (button_text), image-box cards, icon-list (5 items), nested accordion FAQs, and the homepage hero exists twice (desktop + mobile) and must be injected into both.
